name: Home Inventory
description: Catalog belongings for insurance, moving, or organization. Track items by location, category, and value.
author: ultralight

add.description: Add an item to your inventory. Specify where it is, what it's worth, and any notes.

location.description: Where the item is (e.g. living room, garage, kitchen)

list.description: List inventory items, optionally filtered by location or category.

search.description: Search items by name, notes, location, or category.

value.description: Calculate total inventory value, optionally grouped by location or category.

location.description: Calculate value for a specific location

category.description: Calculate value for a specific category

export_summary.description: Generate a full inventory summary organized by location, suitable for insurance documentation.

status.description: Quick overview: total items, locations, categories, and value.
